title: BigQuery lead-management handoff (Dec 19 2025) — Elijah's 6.4GB B2B leads
html:
TL;DR

  • Handoff doc Yahir wrote for Elijah (Yahir is the technical-architect / next-person-up — Elijah is the data owner running the upload from his Windows machine). The asset: a 6.4GB MASTER_B2B_LEADS CSV Elijah owns; the goal: filter by industry (e.g. extract 10K construction businesses), mark leads used atomically, plug into n8n for outreach campaigns.
  • Architecture chosen: local CSV → Google Cloud Storage (staging bucket, name redacted) → BigQuery table → SQL filter → mark-as-used UPDATE → n8n BigQuery node → email automation. Yahir explicitly compares-and-rejects pure-n8n (memory crash >100MB), Pandas (no UI), Clay/Airtable ($149+ + row caps), Excel/Sheets (can't open 6GB).
  • Cost discipline: ~$0.13/mo storage, $0/mo queries inside 1TB free tier — "effectively free for this use case." The whole stack picked to be sub-$1/month.
  • State at handoff: gcloud installed and authed, project + dataset + bucket created, the 6.4GB file mid-upload at 1.4 MiB/s (~80 min ETA). Steps 5–9 (load → ALTER ADD used BOOL DEFAULT FALSE → SELECT WHERE LIKE '%construction%' AND used=FALSE LIMIT 10000 → UPDATE SET used=TRUE → n8n nodes) are scripted out so Elijah can resume solo.
  • Open questions Yahir flags for Elijah before Step 7: real industry-column name (could be industry, sic_code, business_type, category), other column inventory, and what counts as "construction" (string LIKE, exact, or SIC 1500–1799 / NAICS).

Why this matters in the graph

  • This is Yahir-as-fractional-CTO in real time — building the data spine for someone else's outreach business while he's still 11 days out from naming the GEO AI AAS Agency in his own writing. Same week as the Rankett 12 month plan — December 2025 is when Yahir starts shipping infrastructure, not just specs.
  • The doc is also a published example of his explanation craft — the "Why BigQuery?" / "Alternatives considered" / "Step-by-Step (What we did & where we are)" / "Current Action Required" template is reusable across his other handoffs.
  • "No duplicate risk: the used = TRUE/FALSE flag ensures atomic marking" — a clean lead-deduplication-via-atomic-flag pattern in plain English.

Privacy

  • Redacted inline in this summary: Elijah's personal Gmail address (used as the gcloud auth account in the doc), the GCP project ID, the storage bucket name, and the local file path on Elijah's Windows machine. The raw doc preserves all of these for reference; this summary deliberately does not surface them so the wiki graph stays scannable without leaking partner-side credentials/account-handles. No API keys, JWTs, sk- tokens, or service-account JSON in the source — just an OAuth account email + project slug.
  • Yahir himself does not appear by PII in this doc.

Relations

  • elijah leach — the partner this is for
  • n8n — the orchestration layer downstream
  • 2025 12 30 GEO AI AAS Agency — same December agency-infra cluster
  • 2025 12 19 rankett 12 month business plan — same-day twin doc
  • email deliverability — adjacent outreach concern
  • ai search optimization — the broader Yahir-as-agency-operator arc this sits inside
